## Test plan

- [ ] No WikiJS leakage in touched files (`{.is-*}`, `<i class="fa`, `published:` / `dateCreated:`)
- [ ] No secrets or personal emails in the diff
- [ ] Updated docs/README/CONTRIBUTING if behavior or deploy steps changed
